quest.tech.advancedmaterials.acetaldehyd: Refine ethanol into acetaldehyde in the Refinery using a silver plate as the catalyst.
quest.tech.advancedmaterials.arc_furnace: The &bArc Furnace&r is used for high tier recipes, as well as increasing ore yields.
It requires &ethree&r Graphite Electrodes placed in the &etop slots&r to function.
Power must be supplied to the &ethree plug-shaped sockets&r at the back.
At maximum speed, it consumes &e6144 FE/t&r.
&7For more information, consult the Engineer's Manual:
quest.tech.advancedmaterials.duroplast.d: Obtain duroplast by bottling phenolic resin in a Bottling Machine using a &bMetal Press Mold: Plate&r.§r
quest.tech.advancedmaterials.duroplast.s: If Plastic is so good why didn't they make a Plastic 2-
quest.tech.advancedmaterials.fermenter.d: The Industrial Fermenter is used for making &bEthanol&r.
Power must be provided through the &ccopper dot on the top&r.
&7Consult the Engineer's Manual for more information on this machine:
quest.tech.advancedmaterials.fermenter.s: Was there an alcohol recipe? I can't remember...
quest.tech.advancedmaterials.high_resist: Craft &enine&r high resistance fibers together to create &bhigh-resistance fabric&r.
Oh, while we're at it, we made Cloth 2, too
quest.tech.advancedmaterials.phenolic_re: Refine Acetaldehyde with Creosote Oil in the Refinery to obtain Phenolic Resin.
Phenolic Resin is used in many materials, so be sure to keep a good stock!
quest.tech.advancedmaterials.refinery.de: The Refinery can be used for making &bBiodiesel&r and &bPhenolic Resin&r.
Fluid must be pumped into both tanks of the Refinery &cthrough the ports on the side&r.
Any &bCatalyst&r, if required, will not be consumed.
&cNOTE:&r &7The Refinery is used for quite a few advanced materials — consider making one to handle each step of the process!&r
&7Consult the Engineer's Manual for more information on this machine:
quest.tech.advancedmaterials.rubber.desc: Mix &brubber base&r and &bredstone acid&r in a &6heated&r Create basin to create &brubber&r.
quest.tech.advancedmaterials.squeezer.de: The Industrial Squeezer is used mainly for making &bPlant Oil&r. It can also be used to press fruits into juice.
Power must be provided through the &ccopper dot on the top&r.
&7Consult the Engineer's Manual for more information on this machine:
quest.tech.bullet_automation.0059B1B5D51: Crush blaze rods into blaze powder.
quest.tech.bullet_automation.13E07BBCEEF: Obtain lead nuggets from lead bars.
quest.tech.bullet_automation.1BC7BCAF9B6: Blaze rods can be found by killing blazes in volcanic biomes.
quest.tech.bullet_automation.5285CFF062A: Sulfur is obtained as a byproduct of crushing blaze rods.
Alternatively, it can be mined from several types of mineral veins.
Crush blaze rods into sulfur dust.
quest.tech.bullet_automation.5CA0A7BB808: You can smelt the brass ingot using any of the following methods; it doesn't matter which one you choose.
Combine zinc and copper to create brass.
quest.tech.bullet_automation.6EE07F1F93C: An easy way is to do this with create drills.
Create and automate a cobblestone generator.
quest.tech.bullet_automation.7E1D321C4E0: Core Sample Drill is used for getting more detailed information out from Mineral Veins.
Using the Core Sample Drill playrs can view the amount of ores that are in the vein and the saturation of the X and Z level of the vein where the sample has been taken from.
Please conduct the &bEngineer's Manual&r for more information on usage instructions of Core Sample Drill.
quest.tech.bullet_automation.7E3D9766C00: Create allows you to do this using encased fans and lava, make sure to ponder [W] on the entry for fans.
quest.tech.bullet_automation.7F432CC747B: Utilize the mineral survey tool to search for traces of mineral veins in the vicinity.
quest.tech.bullet_automation.assemble.de: Combine the bullet casing, lead nugget and gunpowder to make bullets.
To maximize the efficiency of bullet production, consider using a deployer, as they consume fewer resources.
quest.tech.bullet_automation.auricupride: Find and harvest auricupride for copper.
quest.tech.bullet_automation.casings.sub: Press brass in a press with the bullet mold.
quest.tech.bullet_automation.excavator.d: Excavator is used for getting the ores out from a Mineral Vein.

For most chace for getting an ore out of a scoop players can put the most bottom steel block of the Excavator's Bucket Wheel in the same X and Z level of the most saturation containing coordinate of the Mineral Vein.
Excavators dont care about Y level meaning players can stack them on top of each other in air.
Its FE input is located on its side shaped like plugs.
It will drop the scooped up contents of the vein from its back it will also deposit them to any container that is infront if its output.
Please conduct the &bEngineer's Manual&r for more information on usage and building instructions of Excavator.
quest.tech.bullet_automation.galena.subt: Find and harvest galena for lead.
quest.tech.bullet_automation.lava.desc_1: Lava should be easy enough to obtain, right?
quest.tech.bullet_automation.lava.title: Lava Source
quest.tech.bullet_automation.logs.desc_1: Consider automating this for power generation as well.
quest.tech.bullet_automation.logs.subtit: Cut down trees with a mechanical saw.
quest.tech.bullet_automation.logs.title: Logs
quest.tech.bullet_automation.molds.desc_: Obtain any bullet mold from factories in the wasteland.
quest.tech.bullet_automation.molds.subti: Find and loot a bullet mold.
quest.tech.bullet_automation.molds.title: Bullet Molds
quest.tech.bullet_automation.recycle_rod: Craft or obtain a rod mold and use it in a press to convert blaze powder back into blaze rods,
Press blaze powder into blaze rods.
quest.tech.bullet_automation.sandstone.d: Find sandstone from deserts, craft it from sand, or grind gravel into sand using Create.
Find and harvest sphalerite for zinc.
quest.tech.bullet_automation.subtitle: For advanced tech players.
quest.tech.bullet_automation.title: &aAutomation&r | Ammunition
quest.tech.bullet_automation.tree.desc_1: Obtain any sapling and start planting trees.
quest.tech.bullet_automation.tree.title: Planting Trees
quest.tech.bullet_automation.veins.desc_: Information about all available mineral veins are listed in the Engineer's Manual. Refer to [Overview and Resources > Mineral Deposits] for detailed guidance.
quest.tech.bullet_automation.veins.title: Mineral Veins
quest.tech.bullet_automation.water.desc_: Water is even easier to obtain.
quest.tech.bullet_automation.water.title: Water Source
quest.tech.cannons.216523AF1B4B35EF.desc: The cannon builder allows for stacking layers of cannon moulds together to form a thicker barrel. Be sure to Ponder [w] it for more details.
quest.tech.cannons.2374E68577D0CE1F.desc: Water needs to be pumped into the cannon drill while it is drilling.
quest.tech.cannons.27F027AF952DCC96.desc: Each radar must have one reciever. Place it on top of the bearing.
quest.tech.cannons.2F977E2CA6E43B73.desc: One part of three of the autocannon. Every autocannon needs at least one barrel, but can have more depending on how many the material can support.
quest.tech.cannons.3498BFDDB0438A27.desc: The monitor allows you to display all mobs within the radar's radius. You can extend it by connecting more monitors, so long as it is a square. (2x2,3x3, etc)
Right click on the monitor with a data link, then shift right click on the radar bearing to bind the radar to the monitor.
quest.tech.cannons.34C11B97D09A2E87.desc: Combine filled cartridges with a round of your choice.
quest.tech.cannons.366A8D6F395A9920.desc: The weakest of the loading mechanisms, a cap for the cannon that requires it to be loaded from the front.
Only available for cast iron cannons.
quest.tech.cannons.3C2174F8C94382A8.desc: There are many other types of cannon rounds - be sure to experiment to find out what works for you!
quest.tech.cannons.3C7414863779BB0E.desc: Only available for steel and nethersteel cannons.
quest.tech.cannons.41054C7E61253D9A.desc: The smallest cast for a cannon barrel. As barrel thickness does not affect strength, any larger barrel sizes are just for aesthetics.
quest.tech.cannons.41FBEC77574DF09D.desc: Every autocannon needs a recoil spring in the middle, in front of the breech
quest.tech.cannons.4C4CFED96074B324.desc: Every autocannon needs a breech at the back.
quest.tech.cannons.4E2A040010062B5A.desc: A medium strength loading mechanism that comes in a quick firing version that can be opened by hand.
Available for all cannons except nethersteel.
quest.tech.cannons.5018ED0C3CB31A9C.desc: The radar's range can be extended using either radar plates or dishes attached to the reciever.
Both provide the same benefits and can be used interchangeably.
quest.tech.cannons.50D3B74F76954D50.desc: The radar's range can be extended using either radar plates or dishes attached to the reciever.
Both provide the same benefits and can be used interchangeably.
quest.tech.cannons.51AEA7B62735DC60.desc: At least one charge needs to be loaded behind a shell for the cannon to fire. The maximum depends on the strength of your cannon - too strong and it might explode, too weak and it might get stuck!
You can check how many charges your cannon can withstand by looking at a cannon mount with an assembled cannon using enginner goggles.
quest.tech.cannons.5819420DDB15608B.desc: The yaw controller automatically controls the yaw of a cannon. It should be placed on the bottom of the cannon mount and provided with torque.
Right click on a monitor with a data link, then shift right click on the yaw controller to bind the monitor to the controller.
quest.tech.cannons.63804E791ECC4DE3.desc: A radar allows you to automatically target and aim cannons at hostile targets.
The radar itself must be built on top of a radar bearing and powered.
quest.tech.cannons.6B1DA4F03AA4E31B.desc: The pitch controller automatically controls the pitch of a cannon. It should be placed on the side of the cannon mount and provided with torque.
Right click on a monitor with a data link, then shift right click on the pitch controller to bind the monitor to the controller.
quest.tech.cannons.6F906F4BEEFAB985.desc: The encased fan needs to blow into lava to cook the cannon barrels.
quest.tech.cannons.7F2AD686E6A6A45A.desc: The data link allows for transfer of data from the radar to a monitor, and then to the pitch and yaw controllers. You will need to craft at least three.
quest.tech.cannons.artillery.desc_1: In order to fire your cannon, you will need to load shells into it. This guide will only go through the basics of making shells - it is recommended you check guides online for more effective ways to assemble cannons in general.
quest.tech.cannons.artillery.subtitle: Calling down the Thunder
quest.tech.cannons.artillery.title: Heavy Artillery
quest.tech.cannons.assembly.desc_1: Some blocks like the sliding breech, screw breech, autocannon breech or autocannon recoil spring will require additional components to complete after being drilled.
quest.tech.cannons.assembly.subtitle: It fell out...
quest.tech.cannons.assembly.title: Step 2.5: Moving Parts
quest.tech.cannons.autocannon.desc_1: In order to fire your autocannon, you will need to craft ammo containers, which will need to be loaded with shells. This guide will only go through the basics of making shells - it is recommended you check guides online for more effective ways to assemble cannons in general.
quest.tech.cannons.autocannon.subtitle: Gun go BRRRRT
quest.tech.cannons.autocannon.title: Lead Rain
quest.tech.cannons.cannon_drill.desc_1: The next step is boring a hole in the cannon. This requires mounting the cannon on a turntable, providing the drill with torque and water, as well as piston extension poles.
quest.tech.cannons.cannon_drill.desc_2: As with casting, be sure to Ponder [w] the drill for more information, or search online for video guides.
quest.tech.cannons.cannon_drill.subtitle: Drill go brrr...
quest.tech.cannons.cannon_drill.title: Step 2: Drilling
quest.tech.cannons.cannon_mount.desc_1: Move the finished cannon onto a cannon mount. Once attached and activated with a lever, the cannon can be steered up and down using the shaft on the side and steered left and right using the shaft on the bottom.
quest.tech.cannons.cannon_mount.desc_2: Be sure to Ponder [w] the cannon mount for more information, or search online for video guides.
quest.tech.cannons.cannon_mount.subtitle: Create(d) Big Cannons
quest.tech.cannons.cannon_mount.title: Step 4: Mounting
quest.tech.cannons.casting_sand.desc_1: Layers of casting sand need to be stacked and the moulds inserted to form the final shape of your cannon, and the desired material pumped into it afterwards.
quest.tech.cannons.casting_sand.desc_2: As the cannon CANNOT be moved or changed by hand after it is cast, the entire cannon must be assembled in one go, with all necessary block moulds present.
quest.tech.cannons.casting_sand.desc_3: Be sure to Ponder [w] the sand for more information, or search online for video guides.
quest.tech.cannons.casting_sand.subtitle: Avengers, assemble!
quest.tech.cannons.casting_sand.title: Step 1: Casting
quest.tech.cannons.fan.desc_1: Cannon layers must be cooked into barrels by blowing lava over them with an encased fan. You can tell if the setup is correct if they start to smoke.
quest.tech.cannons.fan.desc_2: Once this is complete, they will transform from layers to barrels or chambers automatically.
quest.tech.cannons.fan.subtitle: A fancy word for just cook it again.
quest.tech.cannons.fan.title: Step 3: Annealing
quest.tech.cannons.loader.desc_1: A cannon loader is needed for shells longer than three blocks.
quest.tech.cannons.loader.desc_2: Be sure to Ponder [w] the cannon loader for more information!
quest.tech.cannons.loader.title: Automatic Loading
quest.tech.cannons.movement.desc_1: Once casted, cannons cannot be moved by hand or broken. They must be moved around using Create's contraptions and mechanisms.
quest.tech.cannons.movement.subtitle: Time to test your Create knowledge...
quest.tech.cannons.movement.title: Step 1.5: Moving Your Cannon
quest.tech.cannons.ramhead.desc_1: Shells and charges can be loaded by a ram and removed with a worm.
quest.tech.cannons.ramhead.title: Loading and Removing Shells
quest.tech.cannons.rod.desc_1: Shells up to three blocks long can be manually loaded using the ram rod.
quest.tech.cannons.rod.desc_2: Be sure to Ponder [w] the ram rod for more information!
quest.tech.cannons.rod.title: Manual Loading
quest.tech.cannons.saw.desc_1: In order to begin making cannons or autocannons, you must first acquire the needed moulds by sawing logs with a mechanical saw.
quest.tech.cannons.saw.desc_2: You can choose which mould to craft by crafting a List Filter and dragging the desired mould from JEI into the filter list... or you can gamble until you get the mould you want, then set the filter on the saw.
quest.tech.cannons.saw.subtitle: Let's go Gambling!
quest.tech.cannons.saw.title: Step 0: Moulding
quest.tech.cannons.title: Cannons
quest.tech.create.02B5B15BC297454E.desc_: Spout is a Mechanism that can fill Fluid Containers with fluid and spout fluid on items.
They do not requaire Rotational Force to function.
For its recipes Depot or Basin must be one block below from Spout.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the spout for more assembly and usage instructions
quest.tech.create.03BF0D89133E2CB4.desc_: Chain Conveyor allow players to transmit Rotational Force over distance using chains.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Chain Conveyor for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.059483EC94B20463.desc_: Mechanical Plough is a mechanism that can break blocks with no solid collision hitbox.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the block for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.071F2262B2F212B8.desc_: List Filter allows players to Filter More than One item on Create Parts or Mechanisms.
Items can also be dragged from JEI to be filtered allowing players to get past overlapping recipes.
Make sure to view the List Filter information by doing &6[SHIFT) &r to learn more about its properties.
quest.tech.create.07BF877C4606A265.desc_: Radial Chasis allows attachment of blocks to contraptions with less glue use.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Radial Chassis for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.07C691864685749A.desc_: Pulse Timer allows players to send a redstone signal in a set amount of time.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Pulse Timer for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.0B00FAD271540F90.desc_: Rotation Speed Controller allows fine adjusting of RPM.
&bThis part can be looted from cities.&r
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Rotation Speed Controller for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.0F844EBCAC5AB1AB.desc_: Stressometer allow players the Amount of Stress Units used in a Rotational Force system.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the block for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.10F2C6DA665FF13A.desc_: Analog Lever is a lever that can have its redstone signal level adjusted.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Analog Lever for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.123A8E345E8452AC.desc_: The hand crank is the most basic power source for Create. It is very weak, but should allow you to run the simplest machines.
Remember to use &6[W]&r to Ponder for a detailed guide on how to use them!
quest.tech.create.12A9A00CE1BF18EE.desc_: Water wheels are one of the most primal methods of generatin SU.
They spin by having water/lava flow from one direction.
Small water wheel generates &6128 SU&r and spins in &68 RPM&r.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the block for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.142CF5C6F3FFD84B.desc_: Rope Pulley allows the making of contraptions that can go Upwards and Downwards.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Rope Pulley for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.14D0235100D4693A.desc_: Gantry Carriage allows the making of &bContraptions&r that can go on &bGantry Shafts&r.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Gantry Carriage for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.16905D5A6AC8B974.desc_: Andesite Alloy is the base material for most Create contraptions.
It is crafted from andesite and iron or zinc nuggets.
While it is possible to automate andesite production using lava, gravel and flint, looting buildings for create components may be faster for starting up.
quest.tech.create.1796CA40445C84B1.desc_: The &bBurner&r is an alternative to the Blaze Burner, and can be used wherever one is required.
It runs on flammable fluids. &b(Gasoline, Diesel, Biodiesel)&r
Adjust its heat level between &bHeated&r and &bSuperheated&r by providing rotation to the shafts on its sides.
quest.tech.create.187FE63911DA0E31.desc_: Large Water Wheel is an upgraded version of the Water Wheel.
Large Water Wheel generates &6512 SU&r and spins in &64 RPM&r.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the block for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.18C235B3732CC6EA.desc_: Deployers allows players to interract with the world around them automaticly
They are also widely used in Seqeunce recipes.
&bThis part can be looted from cities.&r
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Deployer in order to learn more about world interractions.
quest.tech.create.1B69275A5ED2FD8B.desc_: Engineer's Goggles allow players to see more detailed information about Create mechanisms.
Make sure to view the goggles information by doing &6[SHIFT) &r to learn more about its properties.
quest.tech.create.1D6C7EF57AF85497.desc_: Portable Fluid Interface Allows Fluids to be inputed/outputed to &bContraptions&r.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Portable Fluid Interface for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.1E41ACE1697D0A5D.desc_: Brass Tunnel allows routing that are running on a belt and can also be configured.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Andedite Tunnel for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.1E9E324C1BE04058.desc_: Rolling mills ares used in Rolling recipes.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Rolling Mill for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.1ED821E024944D15.desc_: &7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Modular Diesel Engine for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.20894FBBF0847BCC.desc_: Speedometer allows players to view the Rotations Per Minute in a Rotational Force system.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the block for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.214A61114CD62E5B.desc_: Mechanical saw is a mechanism thats mostly used in Sawing recipes and &bTree farms&r.
&bThis part can be looted from cities.&r
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the block for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.21FFC8D3E2F562B5.desc_: Chute allows vetircal transportation of items.
&bThis part can be looted from cities.&r
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Chute for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.2209DFF323428DE6.desc_: Attribute Filter allow players to set Filters Using NBT Tags and Attributes of the set item.
Make sure to view the Attribute Filter information by doing &6[SHIFT) &r to learn more about its properties.
quest.tech.create.243E3B6CD4896416.desc_: Linear Chasis allows attachment of blocks to contraptions with less glue use.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Linear Chassis for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.2598E758ABF169BB.desc_: Fluid pipe is used along with Mechanical Pump for fluid transportation.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Fluid Pipe for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.264CD4C54BDDF0BE.desc_: Hose Pulley allows players  to empty or fill desired location with fluids.
For a fluid source to be counted as Bottemless Supply it needs to cover &e10.000&r blocks of space (this doesnt have to be all source blocks).
&8Only water and lava can be bottemless.&r
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Hose Pulley for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.265D98628D9B1C27.desc_: &bBlaze burners&r can be converted to use flammable liquids as fuel instead of solids by giving them a &bstraw&r.
Liquids can be pumped in from any side.
quest.tech.create.28A7F8650DA7FB01.desc_: Mechanical Mixers are used along with basins.
There must be one block gap between Mixer and the Basin
To make mixing or automated brewing recipes players need to give Rotational force from top cog part and provide the materials to Basing below the mixer.
&bThis part can be looted from cities.&r
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Mechanical Mixer for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.297BBBAF7B35C273.desc_: Diesel Engines allows players to use &bDiesel&r and &bGasoline&r to generate Rotational Force.
Diesel will provide more Rotational Force generation than Gasoline.
Higher Tiers of Diesel Engine will generate more Rotational force.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Diesel Engine for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.29F7FC38D025A047.desc_: Pulse Extender allows players to lengthen a redstone signal it will still give redstone signal for a set amount of time when the input signal is lost.
It can be toggeled to give always redstone signal before reciveing a redstone signal to make it not give a redstone signal.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Pulse Externder for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.2AF4D389189DEF38.desc_: Depot allows one stack of items to be deposited on top of the Depot.
It is also used along with &bDeployers&r and &bSpouts&r for making few recipes.
&bThis part can be looted from cities.&r
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Depot for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.2ED4B06E21678937.desc_: Rolling mills ares used in Milling recipes.
&8There is a shaft input from bottom.&r
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Rolling Mill for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.2FBB4EA7457A38A5.desc_: Steam Engines Allow players to generate large amounts Rotational Force making them relaible in bases or any create setup that requaires large amounts of Rotational Force.
Steam Engine's Rotational Force generation will depend on its level, 3 factors decides Steam engines level.
I will try to explain the details of these in the next checkmarks.
Level of a Steam Engine depends on the lowest factor.
A max level for a Steam Engine is 18.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Steam Engine for for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.2FFF903344B01FCE.desc_: Windmill Bearing allows players to make Windmill Contraptions Generating &6SU&r.
Windmill Bearings &6SU&r and &6RPM&r depends on the amount of Sail like blocks Attached to it these being:
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the block for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.307C83AB19ECDECF.desc_: Zinc is an ore added by Create its used mainly in making &bBrass&r but some recipes do requaire Zinc.
Zinc generaters Between &6-63&r and &670&r Y levels.
Its suggested Players loot for this ore as some buildings contain them.
quest.tech.create.33BA472281A933AA.desc_: Mechanical harvester is a mechanism thats used in crops farms.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the block for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.38A56D8B43C26FA8.desc_: Secondary Linear Chasis allows attachment of blocks to contraptions with less glue use.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Secondary Linear Chassis for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.3B1834C7A3018EB2.desc_: Mechanical Presses are used in varaity of recipe types and is a must to automate most basic products such as plates.
For Metal Press to function Depot or Basin must be one block below from Metals press.
&bThis part can be looted from cities.&r
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Metal Press for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.3BE36407F2FF667E.desc_: Powered Latch is a redstone to toggeled lever.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Powered Latch for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.3CF34ECDAF39511F.desc_: Item Vault is a special storage container that can store large quantities of items.
One Item Vault can hold &e20&r stacks.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Item Vault for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.40D224015F70F452.desc_: Pulse Repeater allows players to delay a redstone signal.
It can be toggeled to give always redstone signal before reciveing a redstone signal to make it not give a redstone signal.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Pulse Repeater for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.43491FFF387898BF.desc_: Allows players to stop Rotational force with redstone.
&bThis part can be looted from cities.&r
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the block for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.458E2877AF426551.desc_: Andesite Tunnel allows routing that are running on a belt.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Andedite Tunnel for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.45ABDC05D64DD01D.desc_: Empty Blaze Burners are used to capture blazes or to craft burners.
quest.tech.create.45B0294F2741DC07.desc_: Display Board Allows the display of information from Data Link or can be Written on it Using the Clip Board.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Display Board for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.470FD8DC9F35B0E8.desc_: Brass is an alloy added by Create and its an essential for making bullets and being used in some Create mechanisms recipes.
Players can alloy &bCopper&r and &bZinc&r using either &bAlloy Kiln&r, &bHeated Mixing&r, or &bArc Furnace&r.
Its suggested players loot the brass requaired for crafting Create mechanisms or loot the mechanisms that requaires brass from cities since they might want to save brass for ammo production.
quest.tech.create.4C7D78B9F898CF8D.desc_: Nixie Tube Allows the display of information from Data Link or can be Written on it Using the Clip Board.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Nixie Tube for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.4CCEB3C6B08F0AE6.desc_: Crushing wheel is a Create mechanism that allow players to do Crushing recipes.
They can be placed horizontally and vertically.
They can crush items faster than &bMill stone&r.
Faster the crushing wheel pair spins faster the crushing will be.
Crushing wheel's will delete items that dont have any recipes when inputted.
&cWarning: &rCrushing Wheels will suck and damage the mobs and players that happen to touch its input part.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the block for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.4E510D7B69C82771.desc_: Powered Toggle Latch is a redstone to toggeled lever.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Powered Toggle Latch for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.4EFF261CA6448DFB.desc_: Enchased Chain drives allows players to transport Rotational force in one row.
&bThis part can be looted from cities.&r
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the block for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.50E67D6EA40930F4.desc_: Display Link can get various information out of certian Create Parts, Mechanisms and Storage blocks and send them to &bDisplay Board&r and &bNixie Tube&r.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the block for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.5188B17C777DCC10.desc_: Mechanical Piston can push blocks infront of them making them act as a Contraption.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Mechanical Piston for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.52CE4570754DA084.desc_: &7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Huge Diesel Engine for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.53860D5449B687E6.desc_: Mechanical Bearing allows the making of contraptions that rotates.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Mechanical Bearing for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.53945B4AC503B296.desc_: Cart assembler allows the making of contraptions that can go on rails.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Cart assembler for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.59B2B82E3DA230F0.desc_: Portable Storage Interface Allows items to be inputed/outputed to &bContraptions&r.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Portable Storage Interface for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.5A967601B829AD87.desc_: Threshold Switch can be configured to give redstone signal once the container its connected to has a set amount of content.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Threshold Switch for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.5B1EE63BDF9CC7A2.desc_: Andesite Funnel allows outputting/inputting of items from most blocks with inventories.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Andesite Funnel for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.5E6BCB1C210ECCAA.desc_: Item Drains can deposit Fluids from Buckets and Bottels.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Item Drain for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.60B2E0797ACFA728.desc_: Sticky Mechanical Piston can push and pull blocks infront of them making them act as a Contraption.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Sticky Mechanical Piston for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.66CD23DCBC4D3FB4.desc_: Adjustable Chain Gearshift allows players to double or half the RPM of the Rotaional force.
&bThis part can be looted from cities.&r
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the block for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.66F18ACCA5D77E76.desc_: Elevator Pulley allows the making of Elevator &bContraptions&r.
Most Large buildings will contain a pre built Elevator its suggested that players repair it for easier acces to floors in case they base in one of them.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Elevator Pulley for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.67312C43D417F84D.desc_: Mechanical Pump allows players to extract certian fluids from World or Fluid storages and moved along with pipes.
Mechanical Pump pumping rate is &emb/t = RPM/2&r.
They can send fluids &e16&r blocks forwards or backwards.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Mechanical Pump for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.679B225FC884DD88.desc_: Clip Board allows players to Write on the &bDisplay Board&r and &bNixie Tube&r.
Make sure to view the Clip Board's information by doing &6[SHIFT) &r to learn more about its properties.
quest.tech.create.689D57C92C04073A.desc_: Redstone Link allows the transmittion of redstone signal wirelessly.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Redstone Link for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.698FEC99DB8771A3.desc_: Mechanical Roller is a mechanism that is used for mostly making roads and bridges.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the block for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.6A40CBE1C2DB3A81.desc_: Gearboxes allow Rotational force to change directions.
&bThis part can be looted from cities.&r
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the block for assembly and usage instructions!m!
quest.tech.create.6C4554ECD0101C72.desc_: Smart Observers can be filtered to give redstone signal once they see a certain block/content/fluid.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Smart Observer for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.6D94E17FF175F0AF.desc_: Blazer Burners can be heated to provide heat to certian recipes or provide heat to a Steam Engine.
There is Two types of heat level for Burners:
&7Its advised that players use fluids to Superheat their burners since Blaze Cake production can cause unnecessary lag.&r
quest.tech.create.6E8C40183C0CB3C8.desc_: Enchased Fans can push or pull items with airflow.
It is also used to do Blasting/Washing/Smoking/Haunting recipes.
When doing these recipe types only having more fans will increase the processing speed.
&bThis part can be looted from cities.&r
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the block for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.6E8C40183C0CB3C8.subti: Not a big fan of fan jokes
quest.tech.create.6F3B04B6DEDD4727.desc_: Fluid Tank is a special storage container that can store large quantities of fluids.
One Fluid Tank can hold &e8.000mb&r of one fluid.
All Fluid Tanks can be extended to &e32&r blocks tall.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Fluid Tank for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.6FF04C917FDB7BC3.desc_: Super Glue Allows non-sticky blocks to be attached to &bContraptions&r.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Super Glue for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.70079790B2D7C963.desc_: Redstone Contact will give out a Redstone signal if its face touches an other Redstone Contacts face.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Redstone Contact for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.718B597B2C544815.desc_: Gearshift changes the rotation with redstone signal.
&bThis part can be looted from cities.&r
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Gearshift for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.737968B10D15BB5B.desc_: Mechnacial Arm allows players to set &binput&r and &boutput&r locations letting Mechanical Arm carry outputs to selected input.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Mechanical Arm for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.742C983EB42BE835.desc_: Smart Chute allows vertical transportation of items in a more configurable way.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Smart Chute for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.747E1C1DAB1534F0.desc_: Mechanical Crafter is a crucial mechanism in Deceasedcraft since most high level recipes relies the usage of them.
To successfully craft in Mechanical Crafters Few contidions Needs to be met:
- Mechanical Crafters can be put in any desired shape aslong as sides of all crafters are touching each others.
- All arrows on the mechanical crafter should led to the same mechanical crafter at end where the last crafter points outwards from the mechanical crafter setup.
-If all slots of a Mechanical Crafter Setup is not filled players can give a redstone signal to any of the crafters to start the crafting.
&bPlayers can loot these mechanisms in Cities.&r
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Mechanical Crafter for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.758CBA78C611683A.desc_: Basins can hold 9 different items and hold 1,000mb of two different liquids.
&bThis part can be looted from cities.&r
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Basin for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.79BB2D901951CEC2.desc_: Electric Motor Uses FE (Forge Energy) to generate Rotational Force.
Electric Motor will produce &b8.192&r Rotational force increasing its power consumption in higher RPM's.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Electric Motor for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.79EB3F6C335293DA.desc_: The Wrench is a very useful tool for rotating and dismantling Create mechanisms. It is recommended you get one as soon as possible if you plan to build a lots of Create mechanisims.
Make sure to view the Wrench's information by doing &6[SHIFT) &r to learn more about its properties.
quest.tech.create.7D4E101CEF9CB463.desc_: Brass Funnel allows outputting/inputting of items from most blocks with inventories in a more configurable way.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Brass Funnel for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.7DC4541F16B0AC2E.desc_: Mechanical drill is a mechanism that can mine the block infront of it.
&bThis part can be looted from cities.&r
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the block for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.7F058C3938D2E6FA.desc_: Belts allows the transportation of items and is an important part to automate Sequenced recipes.
Belts can extend to max of &620&r blocks.
&bThis part can be looted from cities.&r
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the block for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.alternative.desc_1: There are some Alternative Rotational Force generation methods for players to use these being:
quest.tech.create.alternative.title: Alternative Power Sources
quest.tech.create.automated.desc_1: Players can do Sequenced recipes automatically by putting the starter item on top belt line in order to apply the requaired steps one by one.
quest.tech.create.automated.desc_2: As shown in the image above crafting the Basic armor Components needs a longer chain of deployers players can setup a belt line as shown in the other image to automaticly apply all of the items to the starter item.
quest.tech.create.automated.desc_3: Some Sequenced recipes will requaire repeating this means after the first initial applying steps must be done again as the amount shown under the recipe.
quest.tech.create.automated.title: Automated Applying
quest.tech.create.casings.desc_1: Casing can case in specific create parts such as &bshafts&r and &bcogwheels&r.
quest.tech.create.casings.desc_2: They are also used as a base component for most of the Creates mechanisms.
quest.tech.create.casings.desc_3: &bThis part can be looted from cities.&r
quest.tech.create.casings.desc_4: &7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the Casing for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.casings.title: Casings
quest.tech.create.cog.desc_1: Cogwheels allow transferring power to adjacent cogwheels.
quest.tech.create.cog.desc_2: Its also used as a base component for most of the Creates mechanisms.
quest.tech.create.cog.desc_3: &bThis part can be looted from cities.&r
quest.tech.create.cog.desc_4: &7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the block for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.cog.title: Cogwheels
quest.tech.create.cpump.desc_1: A Steam Engine that uses a Mechanical pump for water intake.
quest.tech.create.cpump.desc_2: Rotational force that is generated from Steam Engine can be routed back to the pump to make it self sustaining.
quest.tech.create.cpump.title: Create Pump
quest.tech.create.create.desc_1: Create is used in all stages of progression, especially mid-tier items and equipment, as well as for ammo production.
quest.tech.create.create.desc_2: The simplest way to understand how create machines work is to hover your cursor over the item and hold &6[W]&r to ponder.
quest.tech.create.create.title: Create
quest.tech.create.dengine.desc_1: This part of the quest line shows usefull things to know from create.
quest.tech.create.dengine.title: Usefull items
quest.tech.create.fluid.desc_1: These are the fluid logistics of create.
quest.tech.create.fluid.title: Fluid Logistics
quest.tech.create.generation.desc_1: This part of the quest line will focus on showing the player the ways they can generate &bRotational Force&r.
quest.tech.create.generation.title: Rotational Force Generation
quest.tech.create.heat.desc_1: Amount of water that can be boiled depends on the Heat level.
quest.tech.create.heat.desc_11: Super Heat (Gives 2 Heat level for each placed):
quest.tech.create.heat.desc_2: There is 3 types of Heat supplies.
quest.tech.create.heat.title: Heat
quest.tech.create.heated.desc_1: A Steam Engine that is powered by 9 Heated Blaze Burners can produce &b147,456&r SU.
quest.tech.create.heated.title: Heated
quest.tech.create.item.title: Item Logistics
quest.tech.create.kinetics.desc_1: Kinetic Appliances are used in production of materials.
quest.tech.create.kinetics.desc_2: All Kinetic Appliances uses Rotational Force in order to work.
quest.tech.create.kinetics.desc_3: Rotational Force consists of two things:
quest.tech.create.kinetics.title: Kinetic Appliances
quest.tech.create.logistics.desc_1: Create adds many logistics lets take look at them!
quest.tech.create.logistics.title: Logistics
quest.tech.create.manual.desc_1: Players can do Sequenced recipes manually by putting the starter item on top of a depot and applying the requaired step one by one.
quest.tech.create.manual.desc_2: As shown in the images above crafting the 9mm bullets first step is applying gunpowder pinch to the 9mm bullet casing so a player can put down a deployer and a depot as shown in the image above to manually apply the gunpowder pinch to the 9mm bullet casing.
quest.tech.create.manual.desc_3: Players can give the requaired item to deployer by either giving the item to its hand or supplying the deployer via item inserters such as &bHopper&r,&bFunnels&r ,&bPipez&r,&bExporter&r.
quest.tech.create.manual.title: Manual Applying
quest.tech.create.passive.desc_1: A Passive heated Steam Engine only produced &b2,048&r SU.
quest.tech.create.passive.title: Passive
quest.tech.create.pump.desc_1: A Steam Engine that uses a Pump for water intake.
quest.tech.create.pump.desc_2: Pump Requaires FE and redstone signal to be able to pump water.
quest.tech.create.pump.title: Pump
quest.tech.create.ratio.desc_1: Here is an example of How player can do Gear Ratioing to increase the RPM of a Rotational Force System.
quest.tech.create.ratio.desc_2: Players can use casings in order to compact the desing.
quest.tech.create.ratio.title: Gear Ratio
quest.tech.create.redstone.desc_1: Create has many redstone logistics take a look at them !!
quest.tech.create.redstone.title: Redstone Logistics
quest.tech.create.rpm.desc_1: Rotation Per Minute (RPM) is the spin speed of an Rotational Force system.
quest.tech.create.rpm.desc_2: Higher RPM will make mechanisms work faster.
quest.tech.create.rpm.desc_3: Max RPM is &b256&r if it exceeds 256 part that causes it to exceed will break.
quest.tech.create.rpm.desc_4: If two different Rotational Force systems that have different RPM connect the connected Rotational Force system will have the RPM of the highest one.
quest.tech.create.rpm.desc_5: Players can view the RPM of a Rotational Force system by using a &bSpeedometer&r.
quest.tech.create.rpm.title: Rotation Per Minute
quest.tech.create.sequenced.desc_1: Sequnced recipes are a special recipes type from create it consists of using certian mechanisms on an item to get a product.
quest.tech.create.sequenced.desc_2: In each Sequenced recipe there is a Starter Item and actions that needs to be applied to the starter item.
quest.tech.create.sequenced.desc_3: &cNote:&rGuides Above will show only Deployers used being used in a recipe but if a player comes across different mechanisms that are used but no need to worry since the premise is the same as the deployers.
quest.tech.create.sequenced.title: Sequenced Assembly
quest.tech.create.shaft.desc_1: Shafts allow for power to be transferred in a straight line.
quest.tech.create.shaft.desc_2: Its also used as a base component for most of the Create parts.
quest.tech.create.shaft.desc_3: &bThis part can be looted from cities.&r
quest.tech.create.shaft.desc_4: &7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 the block for assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.create.shaft.title: Shaft
quest.tech.create.sheated.desc_1: A Steam Engine that is powered by 9 Super Heated Blaze Burners can produce &b294,912&r SU.
quest.tech.create.sheated.title: Super Heated
quest.tech.create.size.desc_1: Size of a Steam Engine depends on how many fluid tanks it has.
quest.tech.create.size.desc_2: Its suggested that players make their Steam Engines bottom 3x3 for being able to supply the maximum amount of heat.
quest.tech.create.size.desc_3: Maximum Size for a Steam engine is 3x8x3.
quest.tech.create.size.title: Size
quest.tech.create.sulogistic.desc_1: These parts allow players to have control ever the Rotational Force.
quest.tech.create.sulogistic.title: Rotational Force Logistics
quest.tech.create.title: &6Tech&r | Create
quest.tech.create.valves.desc_1: Valves are an alternative to Hand Crank allowing players to rotate them in specific angels.
quest.tech.create.valves.desc_2: Remember to use &6[W]&r to Ponder for a detailed guide on how to use them!
quest.tech.create.valves.subtitle: one , two and uuh
quest.tech.create.valves.title: Valves
quest.tech.create.water.desc_1: Water shows amount of water that is inside the Steam Engine.
quest.tech.create.water.desc_2: Players can use &bPumps&r to supply their Steam Engine with water.
quest.tech.create.water.desc_3: Higher &bHeat&r levels will make Steam Engine consume more water.
quest.tech.create.water.title: Water
quest.tech.creates.su.desc_1: &bStress Units (SU)&r represent the total amount of force that can be used across a connected set of mechanisms.
quest.tech.creates.su.desc_2: Every mechanism uses a set amount of SU, which &cincreases&r with higher &bRotations Per Minute (RPM)&r.
quest.tech.creates.su.desc_3: If the amount of SU generated is lower than the amount of SU required by all connected mechanisms, the entire system will &coverstress and stop&r.
quest.tech.creates.su.desc_4: Increase with RPM depends on the Kinetic Stress Impact of a mechanism which can be viewed by hovering your cursor on the mechanism in the inventory.
quest.tech.creates.su.desc_5: Player can view the SU information of a Rotational Force system by using a &bStressometer&r.
quest.tech.creates.su.title: Stress Units
quest.tech.drawers.03CE96F2DB81DA0B.desc: Sends out a redstone signal (0-15) depending on how full the drawer is.
For multiple slot drawers, this is the sum of all of the items.
&cNOTE:&r Signals can be read using a comparator.
quest.tech.drawers.0DDB5B47672B9E89.desc: Allows connecting a single drawer to a distant &bDrawer Controller&r.
&6[Right-Click]&r the upgrade to bind it to the Drawer Controller.
quest.tech.drawers.175D6CE77A97384A.desc: Sends out a redstone signal (0-15) depending on how full the &bleast filled slot&r on the drawer is.
&cNOTE:&r Signals can be read using a comparator.
quest.tech.drawers.18C0B641BC6C4F38.desc: Distributes items evenly across all drawers with the same type of item.
&cNOTE:&r This only occurs when items are input via the Drawer Controller. Placing items in a drawer manually will have no effect!
quest.tech.drawers.277E18C68ED5DA34.desc: Displays a fill level meter on the drawer.
quest.tech.drawers.3620D7FDA347F71C.desc: Sends out a redstone signal (0-15) depending on how full the &bmost filled slot&r on the drawer is.
&cNOTE:&r Signals can be read using a comparator.
quest.tech.drawers.3B13743FB893ADC8.desc: Allows connecting a drawer group to a distant &bDrawer Controller&r.
A drawer group is a set of drawers connected adjacent to each other, physically or via Drawer Trims.
&6[Right-Click]&r the upgrade to bind it to the Drawer Controller.
quest.tech.drawers.42D2949B9C4F7B2D.desc: Allows drawers to automatically void excess inputs if all drawers containing that item are full.
quest.tech.drawers.60F290A2472A0280.desc: Makes the contents of drawers glow.
quest.tech.drawers.drawers.desc_1: &bStorage Drawers&r are blocks that allow players to store large quantities of up to four types of items in a single block.
quest.tech.drawers.drawers.desc_3: The &e1x1&r Drawer can store &632&r stacks of &bone&r type of item.
quest.tech.drawers.drawers.desc_4: The &e1x2&r Drawer can store &616&r stacks of &btwo&r types of item.
quest.tech.drawers.drawers.desc_5: The &e2x2&r Drawer can store &68&r stacks of &bfour&r types of item.
quest.tech.drawers.drawers.desc_6: &7Half drawers can store half the stacks of their full sized counterpart.&r
quest.tech.drawers.drawers.desc_7: Store items into drawers with &6[RMB]&r. Note that this will store the entire stack, if space is available!
quest.tech.drawers.drawers.desc_8: Remove a single item from a drawer using &6[LMB]&r. &6[Shift+LMB]&r to remove an entire stack.
quest.tech.drawers.drawers.subtitle: Hold it
quest.tech.drawers.drawers.title: Storage Drawers
quest.tech.drawers.title: &9Storage&r | Storage Drawers
quest.tech.immersive.0858B9CB97437ACF.de: Craft treated wood planks by combining &bplanks&r with &bcreosote oil&r.
Treated wood forms the basis for many &6Immersive Engineering&r machines. Be sure to check what can be crafted using it!
quest.tech.immersive.088FBAA8E4FEFF05.de: The &bEngineer's Workbench&r is used to craft components that may be needed in the recipes of most machine blocks.
In order to use it, you will need the &bBlueprint&r for the item you wish to craft.
Place the blueprint into the &6left slot&r, then place the required crafting materials into the &66 middle slots&r.
If all required materials are present, the desired component can be removed from the &6right slot&r.
quest.tech.immersive.0CE7CDD6A51D849C.de: Some clay will need to be smelted to become bricks. Make sure to keep enough, as the coke brick recipe uses them in a 1:1 ratio.
quest.tech.immersive.140B60F9922D36BA.de: The &bEngineer's Hammer&r allows you to turn ingots into plates, which are used for many Immersive Engineering recipes.
It also is the final step in assembling &emultiblock machines&r.
quest.tech.immersive.163A73D63554D282.de: &bBlast Furnace Preheaters&r are used alongside the Improved Blast Furnace in order to speed up steel processing.
Each preheater will consume &e32 FE/t&r, which must be supplied &cfrom the top&r.
&7For more information, consult the Engineer's Manual:
quest.tech.immersive.164DD663512EF330.de: Craft a coke brick using clay, bricks, and sandstone.
quest.tech.immersive.1A213C739017529E.de: The &bWindmill&r will generate FE depending on its height and the free space around it.
&7Consult the Engineer's Manual for more information on this block:&r &6[Power, Wires, Generators > Power Generation]
quest.tech.immersive.1AE37CAB8B9EDEAC.de: &bNether Bricks&r are made from smelting Netherrack.
Netherrack can be found naturally underground in &eVolcano&r biomes.
Netherrack and Nether Bricks can also be looted from certain buildings.
quest.tech.immersive.1AEB390A9EB70C2E.de: A block used in the construction of multiblock machines.
&cNOTE:&r &7Some buildings contain fully assembled machines. It is recommended you loot these while exploring the city districts.&r
quest.tech.immersive.1BED30F3A78059C0.de: The &bScrew Driver&r allows you to change the redstone configuration of certain machines.
quest.tech.immersive.21BCE73627B47DF9.de: Kiln Bricks can be crafted using bricks and sandstone.
Check the Engineer's Manual for how to create an Alloy Kiln under &6[Workbenches And Furnaces > Alloy Kiln]
quest.tech.immersive.242AE3A8336F6175.de: A byproduct of the production of creosote oil is coal coke, which is an excellent fuel.
It is highly recommended to use this for creating steel.
quest.tech.immersive.293736ADE4BBBB75.de: A block used in the construction of multiblock machines. Requires a blueprint to craft.
&cNOTE:&r &7Some buildings contain fully assembled machines. It is recommended you loot these while exploring the city districts.&r
quest.tech.immersive.2992FCFDEC42448F.de: A block used in the construction of multiblock machines.
&cNOTE:&r &7Some buildings contain fully assembled machines. It is recommended you loot these while exploring the city districts.&r
quest.tech.immersive.2FC4D860C8175089.de: Burn logs, coal or charcoal to obtain creosote oil.
You can take it out using a bucket.
quest.tech.immersive.328CD25E388AB306.de: The &bEngineer's Wire Cutters&r allows you to turn plates into wires. &bWire Coils&r are a cheap way to transfer energy between machines.
quest.tech.immersive.338D93BCE4C979A9.de: A block used in the construction of multiblock machines.
&cNOTE:&r &7Some buildings contain fully assembled machines. It is recommended you loot these while exploring the city districts.&r
quest.tech.immersive.358C7672DF45A9A2.de: Accumulators are used to store energy.
&6[Right-Clicking]&r a side with an &bEngineer's Hammer&r will switch it between &3Input&r, &6Output&r and &7No Connection&r.
&cNOTE:&r &7Recieving energy requires that a side be set to &3Input&7. Likewise, sending energy requires that a side be set to &6Output&r.
quest.tech.immersive.3BEA24C6BAECDF4E.de: Craft a blast brick using nether bricks, bricks, and magma block.
quest.tech.immersive.3C8486EC2F6155EE.de: &bFluid Pumps&r are used for extracting fluids from the world or from fluid containers.
&6[Left-Clicking]&r its side with an &bEngineer's Hammer&r will switch it between &3Input&r, &6Output&r and &7No Connection&r.
The Fluid Pump &cmust be turned on with a redstone signal&r.
The Fluid Pump consumes &e250 FE/t&r, which must be supplied &cfrom the top&r.
&7For more information, consult the Engineer's Manual:
quest.tech.immersive.3E1518F914DE49E1.de: Clay deposits can be found near rivers and in oceans.
It can also be automated as a byproduct of crushing gravel using &bCreate&r.
quest.tech.immersive.3F230E315869B401.de: The &bKinetic Dynamo&r is required to extract FE from the Waterwheel/Windmill that is attached to it.
&cNOTE:&r &7This block has no internal storage, meaning power will not be generated unless there is a block that consumes power on the network.&r
&7Consult the Engineer's Manual for more information on this block:&r &6[Power, Wires, Generators > Power Generation]
quest.tech.immersive.4182D3A471447D9A.de: The &bSchematic Table&r allows you to display multiblock buildings layer by layer - as well as showing where you may have placed or used incorrect blocks.
Place paper into the slot and select the building you want to make.

Once you've made the schematic, hold §6[Shift + Right Click]§r on the ground to mark the location you want to build. After that, placing the schematic on your offhand will show a hologram of the structure.
quest.tech.immersive.41DC77B2FAC603C7.de: The &bExternal Heater&r allows vanilla furnaces to work without any fuel.
Each added External Heater on the sides of the furnace will increase the processing speed of the furnace.
The first heater will consume &e8 FE/t&r.
Each additional heater willl consume &e24 FE/t&r.
&7For more information, consult the Engineer's Manual:
quest.tech.immersive.45782145B05F2B8B.de: The Alternator generates FE using &6Create's&r SU.
It will generate 180FE/t with 256 RPM / 8192 SU.
&7Make sure to Ponder &6[W]&7 this block for more assembly and usage instructions!
quest.tech.immersive.58E4A09C8032AED3.de: &bGarden Cloches&r are used for rapid growing of crops.
&7For more information, consult the Engineer's Manual:
quest.tech.immersive.5CF34331154C7818.de: A block used in the construction of multiblock machines.
&cNOTE:&r &7Some buildings contain fully assembled machines. It is recommended you loot these while exploring the city districts.&r
quest.tech.immersive.5D1AC4A264B5B2F0.de: Accumulators are used to store energy.
&6[Right-Clicking]&r a side with an &bEngineer's Hammer&r will switch it between &3Input&r, &6Output&r and &7No Connection&r.
&cNOTE:&r &7Recieving energy requires that a side be set to &3Input&7. Likewise, sending energy requires that a side be set to &6Output&r.
quest.tech.immersive.5DEA7081F9D3384F.de: The &bWaterwheel&r will generate FE according to the amount of flowing water on each side.
Each &bKinetic Dynamo&r can support up to &63&r Waterwheels.
&7Consult the Engineer's Manual for more information on this block:&r &6[Power, Wires, Generators > Power Generation]
quest.tech.immersive.6153822A9AA3BEB7.de: &bMagma Blocks&r can be found naturally generated in the world.
It is also abundant in the &eHighrise Residential District&r.
quest.tech.immersive.63FEF910BC06E21B.de: &bSteel&r is a middle-tier material used in weapons, armor and many machines.
&cNOTE:&r &7As it is very commonly used in recipes, it is advised that players automate steel as soon as possible.&r
quest.tech.immersive.656BFE961F1F4C20.de: The &bCharging Station&r allows players to charge items that require FE to function.
It can transfer power to an inserted item at a rate of up to &e256 FE/t&r.
&7For more information, consult the Engineer's Manual:
quest.tech.immersive.6697C7C47C348138.de: The Engineer's Blueprint for &bCrafting Components&r and &bMetal Press Molds&r can be looted in the &eHighrise Office&r &bCar Workshop&r.
It can also be purchased from NPCs.
quest.tech.immersive.6765AB0C8154A895.de: The Thermoelectric Generator generates FE according to the temperature difference of the blocks placed on opposite sides of it.
&cNOTE:&r &7This block has no internal storage, meaning power will not be generated unless there is a block that consumes power on the network.&r
&7Consult the Engineer's Manual for more information on this block:&r &6[Power, Wires, Generators > Thermoelectric Generator]
quest.tech.immersive.6C8F3569743BC104.de: Adding &bWindmill Sails&r to the &bWindmill&r will make it spin faster and generate more electricity.
&7Consult the Engineer's Manual for more information on this block:&r &6[Power, Wires, Generators > Power Generation]
quest.tech.immersive.7B0E5CF645B906B4.de: The Heavy Engineering Block Blueprint can be found in the &bHardware Store - IE&r in the &eRetail District&r.
quest.tech.immersive.7BD31D3320CFD3B2.de: Accumulators are used to store energy.
&6[Right-Clicking]&r a side with an &bEngineer's Hammer&r will switch it between &3Input&r, &6Output&r and &7No Connection&r.
&cNOTE:&r &7Recieving energy requires that a side be set to &3Input&7. Likewise, sending energy requires that a side be set to &6Output&r.
quest.tech.immersive.alloy.desc_1: Some machine parts require the alloys &bElectrum&r and &bConstantan&r.
quest.tech.immersive.alloy.desc_2: These alloys can be looted from buildings, or made using an &bAlloy Kiln&r, &bMechanical Mixer&r, and later on, an &bArc Furnace&r.
quest.tech.immersive.alloy.title: Alloys
quest.tech.immersive.aworkbench.desc_1: Automated Workbench allow players to automate blueprint recipes.
quest.tech.immersive.aworkbench.desc_2: Places indicated with Blue are Input.
quest.tech.immersive.aworkbench.desc_3: Players must provide the Blueprint of desired item and chose it from the Automated Workbench's GUI.
quest.tech.immersive.aworkbench.desc_4: It will output from the end of the belt it can store the outputs directly inside of the container that is infront of its output.
quest.tech.immersive.aworkbench.desc_6: Please conduct the &bEngineer's Manual&r for more information on usage and building instructions of Automated Workbench.
quest.tech.immersive.aworkbench.title: Automated Workbench
quest.tech.immersive.blastfurnace.desc_1: &7Be sure to check the Engineer's Manual for how to create a Blast Furnace under &6[Workbenches And Furnaces > Crude Blast Furnace]
quest.tech.immersive.blastfurnace.title: Blast Furnace
quest.tech.immersive.cokeoven.desc_1: &7Be sure to check the Engineer's Manual for how to create a Coke Oven under &6[Workbenches And Furnaces > Coke Oven]§r
quest.tech.immersive.cokeoven.title: Coke Oven
quest.tech.immersive.crusher.desc_1: Crusher is used for doing Crusher recipes.
quest.tech.immersive.crusher.desc_2: It can take items by dropping them to its top or they can be inserted from the places where players put the hoppers while assembling the Crusher via inserter type blocks.
quest.tech.immersive.crusher.desc_4: Please conduct the &bEngineer's Manual&r for more information on usage and building instructions of Crusher.
quest.tech.immersive.crusher.title: Crusher
quest.tech.immersive.dieselgen.desc_1: The Diesel Generator can produce up to &e8192 FE/t&r.
quest.tech.immersive.dieselgen.desc_6: Fuel must be input through the ports on either one of its sides.
quest.tech.immersive.dieselgen.desc_7: Power is output from the top copper dots.
quest.tech.immersive.dieselgen.desc_8: &7Consult the Engineer's Manual for more information on this machine:
quest.tech.immersive.dieselgen.title: Diesel Generator
quest.tech.immersive.iblast.desc_1: Improved Blast Furnaces can use &bBlast Furnace Preheaters&r to speed up the process of steelmaking.
quest.tech.immersive.iblast.desc_2: Up to &etwo&r preheaters can be attached to each side.
quest.tech.immersive.iblast.desc_3: Each attached preheater will increase the processing speed of steel by &e2x&r.
quest.tech.immersive.iblast.desc_4: &cNOTE:&r &7Blast Furnace Preheaters need to be powered!&r
quest.tech.immersive.iblast.desc_5: &7For more information, consult the Engineer's Manual: &6[Workbenches And Furnaces > Improved Blast Furnace]
quest.tech.immersive.iblast.title: Improved Blast Furnace
quest.tech.immersive.lightningrod.desc_1: Lightning Rod can capture large amount of FE from lightnings.
quest.tech.immersive.lightningrod.desc_2: Chance for a lightning to struck the rod is increased by making the steel rod longer and adding more fences to its end.
quest.tech.immersive.lightningrod.desc_3: Lighning rod does not use natural lighnints instead each rainy and thunderstorms makes it so lighning rod can spawn its own lightning.
quest.tech.immersive.lightningrod.desc_4: Please conduct the &bEngineer's Manual&r for more information on usage and building instructions of Lightning Rod.
quest.tech.immersive.lightningrod.title: Lightning Rod
quest.tech.immersive.machine.desc_1: Simple Machines are single or double block machines that can be crafted in a crafting grid.
quest.tech.immersive.machine.desc_3: &bImproved Blast Furnace &7- Speeding up steel production
quest.tech.immersive.machine.title: Simple Machines
quest.tech.immersive.manual.desc_1: &bImmersive Engineering&r is crucial in creating and automating late game materials.
quest.tech.immersive.manual.desc_2: It is recommended you consult their &bmanual&r§r if you're ever stuck about how to use a machine.
quest.tech.immersive.manual.subtitle: You get a multiblock, and you get a multiblock...
quest.tech.immersive.manual.title: The Engineer's Manual
quest.tech.immersive.multi.desc_1: Larger Immersive Engineering machines are built as &bMultiblocks&r that must be assembled by placing certain block types in a specific order.
quest.tech.immersive.multi.desc_2: Building instructions for these machines can be found in the &bEngineer's Manual&r under &6Heavy Machinery&r.
quest.tech.immersive.multi.desc_3: Once the blocks are placed, the machine can be assembled by &6[Right-Clicking]&r the face &chighlighted in red&r with an &bEngineer's Hammer&r.
quest.tech.immersive.multi.desc_4: Most machines have several features in common:
quest.tech.immersive.multi.desc_5: &7Positions with a &eCopper Dot/Sockets&r &7are where the machine should recieve/output power.
quest.tech.immersive.multi.title: Multiblock Machines
quest.tech.immersive.pipes.desc_1: The &bPipez&r mod provides a better alternative for energy transfer than IE's default wires.
quest.tech.immersive.pipes.desc_2: Consider checking out how to use it in the &6Useful Tools&r chapter.
quest.tech.immersive.pipes.subtitle: Now, a word from our Sponsor...
quest.tech.immersive.pipes.title: Alternate Power Transfer
quest.tech.immersive.press.desc_1: Metal Press allows players to use specific molds to make them able to craft the desired item.
quest.tech.immersive.press.desc_2: Player can give the desired Mold to Metal Press by Doing &eRight Mouse Button&r action to the press part of the Metal Pres while holding the desired mold. Players can change the mold by doing Right Mouse Button action to the same place while holding an other mold.
quest.tech.immersive.press.desc_3: Metal Press can get inputs directly with inserter type blocks from its back. Metal Press will deposit output directly to the container that is infront of its output.
quest.tech.immersive.press.desc_4: Metal Press Will deposit the output directly on the containet that is on the end of its track.
quest.tech.immersive.press.desc_6: Please conduct the &bEngineer's Manual&r for more information on usage and building instructions of Metal Press.
quest.tech.immersive.press.title: Metal Press
quest.tech.immersive.sandstone.desc_1: Find sandstone from deserts, craft it from sand, or grind gravel into sand using &bCreate&r.
quest.tech.immersive.sandstone.title: Sandstone
quest.tech.immersive.title: &6Tech&r | Immersive Engineering
quest.tech.immersive.torches.desc_1: One of the new recipes added by this modpack lets you craft torches in bulk using creosote and wool.
quest.tech.immersive.torches.desc_2: See if you can find it!
quest.tech.immersive.torches.subtitle: Let there be light
quest.tech.immersive.torches.title: Mass Torch Production
quest.tech.nuclear.guidebook.desc_1: Even destroyed, the nuclear power plant in the wasteland provides a significant amount of reactor components... Perhaps it is time to try building your own?
quest.tech.nuclear.guidebook.desc_2: The nuclear reactor and its turbines are the end-game power solution for Deceasedcraft. Its immense power output is one of the few things needed to restart the ruined laboratory portal.
quest.tech.nuclear.guidebook.desc_3: However, acquiring the parts needed to assemble such a reactor is quite the challenge, and will likely require significant automation or exploration.
quest.tech.nuclear.guidebook.desc_4: This guidebook will only go through the required parts a reactor will need - consider looking for guides online on how a reactor should be built!
quest.tech.nuclear.guidebook.subtitle: Reinventing the Future
quest.tech.nuclear.guidebook.title: Fundamentals of Nuclear Physics
quest.tech.nuclear.turbine.desc_1: To extract the maximum possible power from a nuclear reactor requires the construction of steam turbines.
quest.tech.nuclear.turbine.desc_2: However, due to their complexity, this guide will not go into detail about how to construct them.
quest.tech.nuclear.turbine.desc_3: It is recommended to look at guides or videos online on how turbines should be set up for optimum power production.
quest.tech.nuclear.turbine.subtitle: But what if we wanted MORE power,,,?
quest.tech.nuclear.turbine.title: Advanced Nuclear Physics
quest.tech.oil_production.0A240AA4074DB2: &o&7A visual guide to setting up a pumpjack can be seen by Pondering &6[W]&r &o&7this item!&r
A pumpjack requires &etwo&r Pumpjack Bearings, one above the &bPumpjack Crank&r and one in the middle of the pumpjack arm.
The bearing above the Pumpjack Crank can be placed easily by looking at the crank with a Pumpjack Bearing and &6[Right-Clicking]&r when an up arrow appears.
The second bearing needs to be at least &63&r blocks away from the back bearing, and will act as the pivot for the pumpjack arm.
&cNote 1:&r &7As long as all functional parts are present, any block can be used to form the pumpjack arm.
&cNote 2:&r &7The formula for calculating the arm length to oil extracted is &e1000*(headPos/backBearingPos)mB&r
quest.tech.oil_production.17678795BE2112: &o&7A visual guide to setting up a pumpjack can be seen by Pondering &6[W]&r &o&7this item!&r
The &bPumpjack Head&r allows the Pumpjack to attach to the Pumpjack Hole.
It must be placed &cdirectly above&r the Pumpjack Hole and connected to the &bBack Pumpjack Bearing&r with blocks.
The entire arm must be glued together with &bSuper Glue&r.
&cNote:&r &7As long as all functional parts are present, any block can be used to form the pumpjack arm.
quest.tech.oil_production.2CF7CEA86CDD1B: &o&7A visual guide to setting up a distiller can be seen by Pondering &6[W]&r &o&7this item!&r
&bDistillation Controllers&r are required to turn &bFluid Tanks&r into &eDistillers&r, which allows turning Crude Oil into &bDiesel&r and &bGasoline&r.
Valid Fluid Tank sizes are &e1x1x3&r, &e2x2x3&r, and &e3x3x3&r.
To convert a Fluid Tank to a &eDistiller&r, &6[Right-Click]&r the tank while holding as many &bDistillation Controllers&r as there are tanks.
&cNote&r: &7The size of the Distiller does &cnot&r &7affect the production rate, only the storage capacity!
quest.tech.oil_production.2E570B178F7A29: &o&7A visual guide to setting up a pumpjack can be seen by Pondering &6[W]&r &o&7this item!&r
Extracting oil requires a &bPumpjack Hole&r connected &cdirectly to bedrock&r.
This can be done by either placing &bFluid Pipes&r under the Pumpjack Hole straight to bedrock, or by directly putting the Pumpjack Hole on top of bedrock.
&cNote: &r&7If using Fluid Pipes to reach bedrock, make sure that they connect both blocks in a straight line!&r&r
Once the Pumpjack Hole is connected under a functional &bPumpjack&r, looking at it will display the exact amount of oil in the chunk.
The extracted oil can be pumped out from this block using a &bMechanical Pump&r once the Pumpjack is active.
quest.tech.oil_production.4FA8C0D344FFB5: &o&7A visual guide to setting up a pumpjack can be seen by Pondering &6[W]&r &o&7this item!&r
The &bPumpjack Crank&r is how the Pumpjack recieves power.
Once placed, the crank size can be configured between &eNormal&r and &eLarge&r by &6[Holding Right-Click]&r on its side.
The crank size determines the &bheight&r of the pumpjack, its power demand, and its pumping speed:
&cNote:&r &7Using the &eLarge &7crank size may be prefered if you have power to spare, as it &bdoubles &7the oil pumping speed.
quest.tech.oil_production.55C6444BC23528: Create Biodiesel by refining &bPlant Oil&r and &bEthanol&r in a Refinery.
quest.tech.oil_production.6C670C0B1F0546: In order to assemble a Pumpjack, you must first obtain its &bblueprint&r.
It can be found as loot in the &eWasteland&r.
quest.tech.oil_production.title: &aAutomation&r | Fuel
quest.tech.power.0799E4EB97D5E91F.desc_1: Duroplast plates are used to create machine casings, which are used to create the reactor casing, the primary block of the reactor.
quest.tech.power.136DFBE9D615F1E5.desc_1: The passive power tap is one of two ways to extract power from the reactor. It is best used with pipez cables.
quest.tech.power.136DFBE9D615F1E5.desc_2: Consider switching to the using other power tap if you cannot extract power from the reactor.
quest.tech.power.184D2918A44AD9B5.desc_1: Aluminium plates are used to create machine casings, which are used to create the reactor casing, the primary block of the reactor.
quest.tech.power.265B6058D2B8C516.desc_1: A reactor needs at least one fuel rod, made of fuel rod blocks stretching from the floor to the ceiling.
quest.tech.power.265B6058D2B8C516.desc_2: The smallest reactor is a 3x3 cube, and has one fuel rod block in the center.
quest.tech.power.35BAF2F5A59BAB7F.desc_1: The active power tap is one of two ways to extract power from the reactor. It is best used with Immersive Engineering power cables.
quest.tech.power.35BAF2F5A59BAB7F.desc_2: Consider switching to the using other power tap if you cannot extract power from the reactor.
quest.tech.power.468467F6C27F1961.desc_1: Machine Casings are used to craft the reactor casing.
quest.tech.power.468467F6C27F1961.desc_2: As they are also used for many Refined Storage components, consider automating this component!
quest.tech.power.47DD1BF174295C0F.desc_1: Steel plates and rods are used to create many reactor and turbine components.
quest.tech.power.47DD1BF174295C0F.desc_2: It is highly recommended to automate your steel production if you are planning to build the larger reactors.
quest.tech.power.4B23C6738F20A51A.desc_1: Lead plates are used for reactor casings and control rods.
quest.tech.power.4B23C6738F20A51A.desc_2: Like steel, It is highly recommended to automate your lead production if you are planning to build the larger reactors.
quest.tech.power.57D2235F1B765DEF.desc_1: The reactor controller is the main control panel for the reactor.
quest.tech.power.57D2235F1B765DEF.desc_2: All reactors require a reactor controller.
quest.tech.power.63ECA9330555EEF4.desc_1: The solid access port is the means by which uranium is inserted and waste is extracted from the reactor.
quest.tech.power.63ECA9330555EEF4.desc_2: All reactors require a solid access port on one of its sides.
quest.tech.power.7084728D1D0357D8.desc_1: Uranium is used as the fuel for the reactor, as well as a component for making the reactor fuel rod.
quest.tech.power.71D88B2FCDD60D8F.desc_1: Graphite electrodes are used for reactor control rods.
quest.tech.power.71D88B2FCDD60D8F.desc_2: As they are also used in the Arc Furnace from Immersive Engineering, consider upgrading your smelting setup to take advantage of the increased ore yield.
quest.tech.power.7494E1B1D3EF85C9.desc_1: Every fuel rod in the reactor must be capped on top with a control rod.
quest.tech.power.7494E1B1D3EF85C9.desc_2: The smallest reactor is a 3x3 cube, and has one control rod block in the middle on top.
quest.tech.power.7FA681EBCAC25EF0.desc_1: A reactor's walls must be made of reactor casings.
quest.tech.power.7FA681EBCAC25EF0.desc_2: The smallest reactor is a 3x3 cube, which consists of 21 casings, with spaces on the side for the reactor power tap, reactor controller and solid access port, and a space on the top for the reactor control rod.
quest.tech.power.title: &6Tech&r | Extreme Reactors
quest.tech.steel.0A3178A3C30B2BDD.desc_1: Obtain plant oil by squeezing plants in the Squeezer.
quest.tech.steel.0A3178A3C30B2BDD.desc_2: A list of squeezable plants can be found in the Engineer's Manual under §6[Heavy Machinery > Squeezer]§r
quest.tech.steel.1D3FE18BE324778F.desc_1: Obtain &bHigh-Carbon Steel Alloy&r by melting &bsteel ingots&r, a block of &bcoal coke&r, and &bnetherite scrap&r in an &eArc Furnace&r.
quest.tech.steel.20CA7FE9A3EA3340.desc_1: Obtain ethanol by fermenting plants in the Fermenter.
quest.tech.steel.20CA7FE9A3EA3340.desc_2: A list of fermentable plants can be found in the Engineer's Manual under §6[Heavy Machinery > Fermenter]§r
quest.tech.steel.23B2629836000A35.desc_1: Craft coal coke into a block. This shouldn't be too hard.
quest.tech.steel.4087BA4F30E7600C.desc_1: Smelt HOP Graphite Dust into ingots.
quest.tech.steel.488E8A6EF1580203.desc_1: Break nethersteel into nethersteel nuggets, then melt the nuggets in a heated Create basin with a Foundry Lid to create molten nethersteel.
quest.tech.steel.4FBC72FA3388FAD3.desc_1: Squeeze coke dust into HOP Graphite Dust.
quest.tech.steel.5103CAFA5A4A478E.desc_1: Mix plant oil and phenolic resin in a heated Create basin to create rubber base.
quest.tech.steel.543A7B198274CC4B.desc_1: Mix redstone dust and water to obtain redstone acid.
quest.tech.steel.5E916EFB8A060563.desc_1: Mix netherite scrap and cast iron ingots in a §esuperheated§r Create basin to create nethersteel.
quest.tech.steel.68D6BA026B159FA8.desc_1: Mix molten nethersteel and phenolic resin in a §esuperheated§r Create basin to create high-resistance fiber.
quest.tech.steel.6C00D05B42443CE0.desc_1: Grind coal coke into coke dust.
quest.tech.steel.6F2FF6DCBF76DB64.desc_1: Compact iron ingots and coal in a heated basin to obtain cast iron.
quest.tech.steel.715E3BA90079D5A8.desc_1: Netherite scrap can be obtained by looting.
quest.tech.steel.title: &aAutomation&r | Advanced Materials
quest.tech.storage.15C7FBB5FA7CBE9D.desc: The Network Card allows &bNetwork Transmitters&r to connect to &bNetwork Receivers&r.
&6[Right-Click]&r a Reciever with a Network Card to bind the card to the Reciever, then place it in the Transmitter.
quest.tech.storage.3EF60B079BBD3420.desc: Advanced processors are used to make the Controller, the heart of a refined storage system.
&7&oThis item is &cvery hard to craft&7 - consider &etrading&7, &elooting&7, or &escrapping&7 more advanced components instead.&r
quest.tech.storage.40FE8E251C2ADB7A.desc: Improved processors are used to make importers, exporters, and many advanced blocks.
&7&oThis item is &cvery hard to craft&7 - consider &etrading&7, &elooting&7, or &escrapping&7 more advanced components instead.&r
quest.tech.storage.41815A3AAA5DFB74.desc: Patterns are set in inside a &bPattern Grid&r and put inside of &bCrafters&r.
quest.tech.storage.44B1D79F3168B9C1.desc: Makes &bExporters&r keep the specified amount of the set item in the container they are connected to.
quest.tech.storage.4510451DFD18B205.desc: The Security Card is used in the &bSecurity Manager&r to specify a player has access to in a network.
&6[Right-Clicking]&r with an unbound security card will bind it to that player.
quest.tech.storage.49257B35D9B75199.desc: &bFilters&r can be used in &bGrids&r to filter what can be displayed when viewing them.
quest.tech.storage.5D3FFD6B80BD9321.desc: Applies Silk Touch to the blocks that are destructed by a &bDestructor&r.
quest.tech.storage.5EE5F71B0CCA0119.desc: Allows &bExporters&r and &bInterfaces&r to request crafting recipes from a &bCrafter&r.
&cNOTE&r: Exporters and Interfaces will only request crafting if there are no items left inside the main system.
quest.tech.storage.6233B5D450408277.desc: Can be used to rotate blocks using &6[Right-Click]&r.
quest.tech.storage.663F855AAFBC2D4B.desc: &bMachine Casings&r are used to make many blocks in the mod, including the Controller.
quest.tech.storage.6893DE0535CBA1EA.desc: Increases the range of the &bWireless Transmitter&r by &68&r per upgrade.
quest.tech.storage.69DB24C53FF0916A.desc: &bStorage Monitors&r allow displaying the amount of an item in the network on a screen.
quest.tech.storage.6F40A9147C893E3C.desc: Basic processors are used to make construction and destruction cores, which are used in blocks that interact with the world (importers/exporters/grids).
&7&oThis item is &cvery hard to craft&7 - consider &etrading&7, &elooting&7, or &escrapping&7 more advanced components instead.&r
